label: KV cache & recurrent inference state

node.label: KV cache & recurrent inference state
node.definition: Intermediate keys, values, or recurrent state are reused across generation steps to avoid recomputation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of KV cache & recurrent inference state is to connect Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Transformers to downstream capabilities including Paged attention & KV-memory management.
examples: substrate for Paged attention & KV-memory management
combined with Caches, APIs & tool interfaces
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Transformers.

dependencies.rationale: KV cache & recurrent inference state uses Caches, APIs & tool interfaces as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
KV cache & recurrent inference state uses Transformers as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
KV cache & recurrent inference state uses State-space transitions as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
